name: Minoa
startIntroPart1: The lilies and the bliss wash over you oh Priestesses, your people have some offerings, your Goddess said, this offering is a proud kingdom of traders and artisans centred on the island of Crete and in it's grandest Palace in Knossos, away from the petty and bloody squabbles of the main Lander around you. In this perpetual Mediterranean bliss and Peace your people blossomed, becoming the most culturally and technologically advanced empire of the age. The tales of your prosperity spread across the isles of the Aegean through your many trade routes and yet somehow you Priestesses remain in the shadows in the Palaces. Sun and the Serpent watch over you, oh mythical and enigmatic Priestesses of Knossos, true Rulers of Crete, Ancestors of Greece. Contemporaries of the Ancient Egyptians, your people were the foremost naval power in the Levant for hundreds of years. The tales of your exploits on Earth fell into mystery, and only clues remain as to the extent of your power. Did you Priestesses truly demand human sacrifice of Athens? Were the caverns under your palaces the twisted labryinth of legend? We will carry your secrets to the underworld, mighty and blessed Priestesses.
startIntroPart2: Oh, daughters of the Mother Goddess, you come to this new world as its Queen-Priestess! The power of the Earthshaker is broken, and we live no longer in the shadow of his fiery wrath! Will you rebuild the glorious metropolis of Knossos? Will your navy bring the sophistication of Crete to every corner of this uncultured world? Oh Priestesses, The Minoan empire has long since fallen and King Minos is dead, your Goddesses is gone, and yet men continue to sing tales of glory to which your kingdom and empire was the setting without singing also your blessed names. It is time to raise that kingdom anew and reclaim your names! Will you spur your merchants and civilians to rebuild their ships and palaces, reclaiming Crete? Will your palaces and pottery once again be the envy of all the nations around you? Will you build a civilization that will stand the test of time?
declaringWar: Resistance is futile! Prepare to be assimilated!
attacked: You want to play? Very funny!
defeated: How is it possible that those Apes hurt us? The galactic senate will take care of them.
introduction: As superior galactic entities, you are not worthy of our attention.
hateNo: We are not agreeing to that!
afterPeace: Very well, all that fighting was getting boring anyway.
tradeRequest: We bestow you the honor of this trade offer.
denounced: The accusations of primitive lifeforms are beneath us.
uniqueText: All Military Land units receive free promotions that allow them to fight and manoeuvre more effectively in Rough terrain.
uniques: City-State Influence recovers at twice the normal rate
City-State territory always counts as friendly territory
